title: AutomateAI Groups
pageDescription: Compile your MCP servers into groups that you can secure and make available through a single unified endpoint for each individual group.
createNamespaceDescription: Create a new group and select MCP servers to include
name: Name
selectServersDescription: Choose which MCP servers to include in this group
createFirstNamespace: Create your first group to get started
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this group?
deleteConfirmation: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the group and remove all associated data.
noMcpServersAvailable: No MCP servers available. Create some servers first.
selectMcpServersDescription: Select MCP servers to include in this group. You can modify this later.
deleteNamespaceDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This will remove the group and all its MCP server associations. This action cannot be undone.

detail.deleteNamespaceConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This will remove all MCP server associations from this group. This action cannot be undone.
detail.connectToMetaMcpToEnable: Connect to AutomateAI MCP to enable enhanced tool management
detail.sessionInitializationTimeoutDescription: Session initialization took too long and was automatically reset. You can try again or use the force reset button.
detail.toggleTooFastDescription: Please wait before toggling again to allow the session to initialize properly.
detail.anErrorOccurredWhileDeleting: An error occurred while deleting the group

enhancedToolsTable.noToolsFound: No tools found from AutomateAI MCP or saved to group
enhancedToolsTable.tryAdjustingSearch: Try adjusting your search terms or clear the search to see all tools.
enhancedToolsTable.cannotToggleStatus: Cannot toggle status for tools not saved to group
enhancedToolsTable.cannotUpdateOverrides: Cannot update overrides for tools not saved to group
enhancedToolsTable.annotationsPlaceholder: Enter tool-specific annotations for this group as JSON
enhancedToolsTable.annotationsHelper: These annotations merge with server-provided metadata and apply only within this group.
enhancedToolsTable.invalidAnnotationsJsonDescription: Please provide valid JSON text for annotations.
enhancedToolsTable.annotationsMustBeObject: Annotations must be a JSON object.
enhancedToolsTable.overridesTooltip: Custom tool title or description is set for this group
enhancedToolsTable.annotationsTooltip: Custom annotations are set for this group

serversTable.noServersDescription: This group doesn't have any MCP servers configured yet.
serversTable.toggleTooFastDescription: Please wait before toggling this server again to prevent conflicts.

toolManagement.noToolsDescription: No tools have been found from AutomateAI MCP or saved to this group yet. Connect to AutomateAI MCP and refresh to discover tools from your servers.
toolManagement.toolsRefreshedDescription: Tools have been refreshed from the AutomateAI MCP connection
toolManagement.noToolsFromMetaMCP: No tools found in the AutomateAI MCP connection
toolManagement.fetchToolsError: Failed to fetch tools from the AutomateAI MCP connection
toolManagement.metaMCPNotAvailable: AutomateAI MCP connection not available, falling back to database refresh

edit.title: Edit Group
edit.description: Update the group name, description, and manage MCP server associations.
edit.createMcpServersFirst: Create some MCP servers first to add them to this group
edit.selectMcpServersHelp: Select the MCP servers to include in this group. You can add or remove servers at any time.
